revision.comment: suggest colon unnecessary as text does not follow on same line, +  per request [[Template talk:S-start#nowrap|here]]
revision.text:
|width="30%" align="center" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"| Succeeded by
'''{{{after}}}''' |- [[Category:Succession templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: add new parameter "as" per [[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Succession Box Standardization#Proposal: Additional Parameter in Template:s-bef and Template:s-aft|discussion]]

revision.comment: track misuse: 'after' parameter includes any of the words: vacant, incumbent, abolished, suspended
revision.text:
| style="width: 30%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"| Succeeded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{after}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after2|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after3|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after4|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after5|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after6|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after7|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after8|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after9|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}} |-{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[iI]ncumbent |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'incumbent']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[aA]bolished |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'abolished']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: do checks only when 'after' is non-empty, and only in articles
revision.text:
| style="width: 30%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"| Succeeded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{after}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after2|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after3|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after4|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after5|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after6|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after7|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after8|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after9|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}} |-{{Main other | -->{{#if: {{{after|}}} |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[iI]ncumbent |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'incumbent']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[aA]bolished |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'abolished']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}}}}}} {{documentation}} Small text

| style="width: 30%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"| Succeeded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{after}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after2|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after3|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after4|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after5|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after6|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after7|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after8|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after9|}}}}}{{S-aft/filter|{{{after10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}} |- {{Main other | -->{{#if: {{{after|}}} |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[iI]ncumbent |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'incumbent']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[aA]bolished |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'abolished']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-aft: 'after' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}}}}}} {{documentation}} Small text
